items.name: 6 7 Dance 🐕
items.description:
[NEW EMOTE UNLOCKED: SIX-SEVEN DANCE]

You channel the viral power of “six-seven” — the meme that launched million-views and zero meaning. With this emote, your moves are half confident swagger, half “what the heck am I doing?” You’ll lean side-to-side as if you just heard someone say “six-seven” and decided it was time to respond with full dance mode. Arms float, hips swivel, feet wander — you’re a walking meme.

Use this when you’re victorious, when you’re defeated, or when you just need a minute to remind everyone you’re plugged into pop-culture chaos. Because yes: the number says nothing. The dance says everything.
67, sixseven, six-seven
